---
title: "rbf_kernel"
generated: true
description: "RBF (Gaussian) kernel $ exp(- gamma  |x - y |^2)$."
---

[‚Äπ back to `nitrix.linalg.kernel`](../nitrix-linalg-kernel.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:rbf_kernel -->
```python
rbf_kernel(X0: Float[Array, '... n d'], X1: Optional[Float[Array, '... m d']] = None, *, theta: Optional[Num[Array, '... d']] = None, gamma: Optional[float] = None) -> Float[Array, '... n m']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:rbf_kernel -->
RBF (Gaussian) kernel $\exp(-\gamma \|x - y\|^2)$.

The squared distance is the (optionally Mahalanobis-weighted)
squared L2 distance from [`linear_distance`](../nitrix-linalg-kernel/linear_distance.qmd).  The default
bandwidth $\gamma = 1 / d$ matches scikit-learn.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:rbf_kernel -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `X0` | `Float` | `...` √ó `n` √ó `d` | ‚Äî | Sample tensors of shape $(\dots, n, d)$ and $(\dots, m, d)$. If `X1 is None`, uses `X0` (self- kernel; the result is $(\dots, n, n)$). |
| `X1` | `Optional[Float[Array, '... m d']]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Sample tensors of shape $(\dots, n, d)$ and $(\dots, m, d)$. If `X1 is None`, uses `X0` (self- kernel; the result is $(\dots, n, n)$). |
| `theta` | `Optional[Num[Array, '... d']]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Optional metric tensor for the distance. Same shape conventions as the `theta` argument of [`linear_kernel`](../nitrix-linalg-kernel/linear_kernel.qmd). |
| `gamma` | `Optional[float]` | ‚Äî | `None` | Optional bandwidth. `None` uses $\gamma = 1 / d$. |

**Returns** `Float` ‚Äî shape `...` √ó `n` √ó `m`. Kernel matrix of shape $(\dots, n, m)$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen perf:rbf_kernel -->
:::: {.callout-note title="Benchmarks ‚Äî nitrix-perf-bench" collapse="true"}
GPU steady-state **186.2 ¬µs** (median, L4); up to **296.54√ó faster** than `sklearn.rbf_kernel`.  [full report](https://github.com/hypercoil/nitrix-perf-bench/blob/main/reports/PERF_RBF_KERNEL.md)

::: {.table-responsive}
| case | platform | param | baseline | status | steady (min/med) | compile | mem | fidelity | ratio |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| rbf_kernel | jax-cpu | n=2048,d=64 | `cupy.rbf_kernel` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| rbf_kernel | jax-cpu | n=2048,d=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 7.87 ms / 15.99 ms | 179.40 ms | 927 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00087√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| rbf_kernel | jax-cpu | n=2048,d=64 | `sklearn.rbf_kernel` | ok | 32.88 ms / 50.61 ms | 52.13 ms | 927 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00017√ótol | 4.18x vs nitrix-jax |
| rbf_kernel | jax-cuda12 | n=2048,d=64 | `cupy.rbf_kernel` | ok | 587.3 ¬µs / 598.1 ¬µs | 111.65 ms | 0.52 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00068√ótol | 3.20x vs nitrix-jax |
| rbf_kernel | jax-cuda12 | n=2048,d=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 183.6 ¬µs / 186.2 ¬µs | 567.79 ms | 105.38 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00087√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| rbf_kernel | jax-cuda12 | n=2048,d=64 | `sklearn.rbf_kernel` | ok | 54.44 ms / 92.22 ms | 112.46 ms | 0.52 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00017√ótol | 296.54x vs nitrix-jax |
| rbf_kernel | jax-cpu | n=4096,d=64 | `cupy.rbf_kernel` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| rbf_kernel | jax-cpu | n=4096,d=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 34.14 ms / 65.05 ms | 436.02 ms | 927 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00087√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| rbf_kernel | jax-cpu | n=4096,d=64 | `sklearn.rbf_kernel` | ok | 199.74 ms / 270.64 ms | 232.16 ms | 927 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00017√ótol | 5.85x vs nitrix-jax |
| rbf_kernel | jax-cuda12 | n=4096,d=64 | `cupy.rbf_kernel` | ok | 3.86 ms / 3.88 ms | 140.67 ms | 1.05 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00072√ótol | 4.09x vs nitrix-jax |
| rbf_kernel | jax-cuda12 | n=4096,d=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 942.4 ¬µs / 949.6 ¬µs | 740.19 ms | 206.57 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00087√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| rbf_kernel | jax-cuda12 | n=4096,d=64 | `sklearn.rbf_kernel` | ok | 174.44 ms / 175.75 ms | 179.65 ms | 1.05 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00017√ótol | 185.10x vs nitrix-jax |
| rbf_kernel | jax-cpu | n=512,d=64 | `cupy.rbf_kernel` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| rbf_kernel | jax-cpu | n=512,d=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 404.3 ¬µs / 768.4 ¬µs | 146.23 ms | 927 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00065√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| rbf_kernel | jax-cpu | n=512,d=64 | `sklearn.rbf_kernel` | ok | 2.14 ms / 3.54 ms | 5.28 ms | 927 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00015√ótol | 5.29x vs nitrix-jax |
| rbf_kernel | jax-cuda12 | n=512,d=64 | `cupy.rbf_kernel` | ok | 124.7 ¬µs / 135.1 ¬µs | 219.19 ms | 0.13 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.0005√ótol | 1.07x vs nitrix-jax |
| rbf_kernel | jax-cuda12 | n=512,d=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 116.9 ¬µs / 121.7 ¬µs | 344.78 ms | 74.45 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.0006√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| rbf_kernel | jax-cuda12 | n=512,d=64 | `sklearn.rbf_kernel` | ok | 1.91 ms / 5.18 ms | 19.33 ms | 0.13 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00015√ótol | 16.34x vs nitrix-jax |
:::

*source: bench `7159b33d` ¬∑ nitrix `fcbe94d3`*
::::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:rbf_kernel -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
| `m` | rows of a multi-row contrast |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
